name: Fall Of The MS Estonia
short_description: Step into the shoes of a passenger aboard the ill-fated MS Estonia in this immersive simulation. Discover what caused the ship's demise on the tragic day of 28th September 1994. With time running out, are you able to find a way off the ship?
detailed_description:
Step aboard the MS Estonia which tragically sank on the 28th of September 1994 in the Baltic Sea.

The Experience

Embark on the final voyage of the ill-fated MS Estonia and experience the final moments of the ships tragic demise.

As a passenger, you get to explore the ship in an immersive simulation that accurately depicts the ships final moments.

Facing an intense storm and critical system failure, the MS Estonia's life-boat system becomes inoperable, and you must find another way to safety before time runs out or stay aboard.

The MS Estonia has never been recreated to this level of detail. The entire exterior of the ship is explorable, with the bridge also being accessible.

Background of the MS Estonia

The MS Estonia, a tragic chapter in maritime history, was a passenger ferry that sank in the Baltic Sea on September 28, 1994. Departing from Tallinn, Estonia, en route to Stockholm, Sweden, the vessel met its end in a violent storm. The disaster claimed the lives of over 800 passengers and crew, making it one of the worst maritime tragedies of the 20th century.

Note: This is a simulation experience not a story-based game
